Author: Brolijah
Name: SimpleTriggers
Description:
This plugin allows you to create custom responses to in-game messages.
Options include responding through in-game chat, in-game sound effects, and even Text-to-Speech.
Punchline: For those of us too lazy to read their screens.
Changelog: v0.3.2 - Import/Export triggers, Config data update. Minor Chat Sanitize fixes.
